form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 3 lengths win at Warrnambool over 390m (22.74) beating Nando Tuff in Bottom Up - Maiden on April 6. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (22.78) at Ballarat in a T3 Grade 7. Has first look at box 3 this time. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 4th on April 1 over 400m at Geelong behind Aston Pluto beaten 6 lengths (23.37) in a T3 Grade 7. Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 425m at Bendigo. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.75 lengths at Warrnambool over 390m (22.73) beating Starbright Hud in Bottom Up - Maiden on January 26. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a T3 Grade 7 on April 1 over 400m at Geelong behind Absolute Faith beaten 4 lengths (23.27). Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame when third (22.81) over 390m at Ballarat. Is worth plenty of thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and stumbled, lost ground turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 12 length seventh over 400m at Geelong. Tested under these conditions.
